title: Universal Stone Blocks
description: "Stone is stone! Let me craft my things using whatever stone I want!" Yeah... that's exactly what this project does.
body:
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/magRl6Sr?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1056751?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=Datapack%20Downloads&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1471073?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=Mod%20Downloads&color=blueviolet) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/magRl6Sr?style=for-the-badge&label=Latest%20release&color=chartreuse) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/AI-AI?style=for-the-badge&label=Never%20by&color=red) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord%20server%20-%20Discord?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Join%20the&color=royalblue&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FDGVD6wBTDF)](https://discord.gg/DGVD6wBTDF)
# About Datapack / mod **Universal Stone Blocks (USB)** is a datapack / mod that modifies and adds a lot of recipes that include stone. Its goal is to make stone blocks more universal and also to make crafting some walls, slabs, and stairs easier. **Stone is stone**, so this project lets you craft itesm using any stone you like. ## Recipes This datapack / mod modifies and adds a lot of recipes. Some of them let you craft mossy variants of cobblestone and stone brick walls, stairs, and slabs. A lot of recipes have been modified so they can be crafted with all unprocessed stone blocks. Some of them include stone tools, **redstone components**, brewing stands, and more. ## Future datapack / mod support and backporting This datapack / mod will be updated once every **full** release of Minecraft as soon as possible. I do not plan on backporting this project unless requested on **Discord**, but you can only request backporting to 1.20.x. I won't be backporting to older versions. ## Compatibility with other mods or plugins If you know a mod or plugin that adds new types of stones that would fit that datapack, let me know on **Discord** and I will publish an add-on.
